glosses.ja: ニット帽; ビーニー

translations.de: Heute nimmst du deine Mütze mit.
translations.it: Oggi porti con te il berretto.
translations.he: היום אתה לוקח את כובע הגרב שלך.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bạn mang theo mũ len của mình.
translations.nl: Vandaag neem je je muts mee.
translations.hi: आज तुम अपनी ऊनी टोपी ले रहे हो.
translations.nb: I dag tar du med deg lua di.
translations.sv: Idag tar du med dig din mössa.
translations.da: I dag tager du din hue med.
translations.ja: 今日はニット帽を持っていく。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; informal subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; agrees with ‘bonnet’.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of ‘prends’.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; specifies the time of the action.

sentences.target: J'oublie toujours mon bonnet au bureau.

translations.fr: J'oublie toujours mon bonnet au bureau.
translations.en: I always forget my beanie at the office.
translations.es: Siempre olvido mi gorro en la oficina.
translations.de: Ich vergesse meine Mütze immer im Büro.
translations.it: Dimentico sempre il berretto in ufficio.
translations.ko: 나는 항상 사무실에 비니를 두고 와요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我总是把毛线帽忘在办公室。
translations.yue: 我成日喺公司遺低我嘅冷帽。
translations.ru: Я всегда забываю свою шапку в офисе.
translations.pt: Eu sempre esqueço meu gorro no escritório.
translations.he: אני תמיד שוכח את כובע הגרב שלי במשרד.
translations.vi: Tôi luôn quên mũ len ở văn phòng.
translations.ar: أنا دائمًا أنسى قبعتي في المكتب.
translations.nl: Ik vergeet mijn muts altijd op kantoor.
translations.uk: Я завжди забуваю свою шапку в офісі.
translations.hu: Mindig az irodában felejtem a sapkámat.
translations.hi: मैं हमेशा अपनी ऊनी टोपी दफ्तर में भूल जाता हूँ.
translations.el: Πάντα ξεχνάω τον σκούφο μου στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Jeg glemmer alltid lua mi på kontoret.
translations.id: Aku selalu lupa kuplukku di kantor.
translations.sv: Jag glömmer alltid mössan på kontoret.
translations.ro: Îmi uit mereu căciula la birou.
translations.cs: Pořád zapomínám svou čepici v kanceláři.
translations.da: Jeg glemmer altid min hue på kontoret.
translations.ja: 私はいつも会社にニット帽を忘れてしまう。

tokens.explanation: Main verb with elided subject clitic ‘j’’ (for ‘je’) before vowel-initial verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive.
Frequency adverb modifying the verb.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; agrees with ‘bonnet’.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of ‘J’oublie’.
Contraction of preposition ‘à’ + definite article ‘le’; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine; head of the prepositional phrase ‘au bureau’ (location).

sentences.target: On cherche un bonnet de bain.

translations.fr: On cherche un bonnet de bain.
translations.en: We're looking for a swim cap.
translations.es: Estamos buscando un gorro de baño.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando una cuffia da nuoto.
translations.pt: Estamos procurando uma touca de natação.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm mũ bơi.
translations.hi: हम स्विमिंग कैप ढूँढ रहे हैं.
translations.ja: スイムキャップを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun (‘we’ in spoken French); 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agrees with ‘On’); transitive.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines ‘bonnet’.
Common noun, masculine; head of the noun phrase; direct object of ‘cherche’.
Preposition introducing a noun complement indicating type (‘de bain’).
Common noun, masculine; complements ‘bonnet’ in a compound meaning ‘swim cap’.

sentences.target: Ce bonnet te va très bien.

translations.fr: Ce bonnet te va très bien.
translations.en: That beanie looks really good on you.
translations.es: Ese gorro te queda muy bien.
translations.de: Die Mütze steht dir sehr gut.
translations.it: Quel berretto ti sta molto bene.
translations.ko: 그 비니가 너한테 정말 잘 어울려요.
translations.pt: Esse gorro fica muito bem em você.
translations.he: כובע הגרב הזה נראה ממש טוב עליך.
translations.vi: Chiếc mũ len đó rất hợp với bạn.
translations.nl: Die muts staat je heel goed.
translations.hu: Ez a sapka nagyon jól áll neked.
translations.hi: यह ऊनी टोपी तुम्हें बहुत अच्छी लग रही है.
translations.el: Αυτός ο σκούφος σου πάει πολύ.
translations.nb: Denne lua kler deg veldig godt.
translations.sv: Den där mössan passar dig väldigt bra.
translations.ro: Căciula asta îți vine foarte bine.
translations.da: Den hue klæder dig rigtig godt.
translations.fi: Tuo pipo sopii sinulle todella hyvin.
translations.ja: そのニット帽はとても似合っている。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determines ‘bonnet’.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the verb ‘va’.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular, indirect object; placed before the verb, complements ‘aller’ in the sense ‘aller à quelqu’un’ (to suit).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; here means ‘suits/looks good on’ with an indirect object.
Degree adverb intensifying ‘bien’.
Adverb of manner; complements ‘va’ to express how well it suits.

We're looking for a swim cap.
That beanie looks really good on you.
